query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A close-up, black-and-white photograph of a person with their hand raised near their mouth, fingers gently curled. The image captures fine facial features including eyes with dark lashes, a nose, and lips partially obscured by the hand. The grainy texture is visible across the entire frame, giving the image an analog photographic quality.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily grainy, black-and-white close-up photograph with a muted, washed-out tonal range showing a person with their hand raised near their mouth, fingers curled. The image exhibits prominent film grain throughout, creating an organic, archival texture, while the desaturated, low-contrast gray tones evoke melancholy and exhaustion.
